_meta.name: 최소 경로 공식 SSOT
_meta.description: 옵션 N개 → 단계최소+차단0+복잡도최소 자동 픽. R34(roadmap)/R35(go) 공유 참조
_meta.rationale: 옵션 1/2/3 제시 → 사용자 재확인 → 실행 패턴은 NEXUS 자율 진행 원칙과 충돌. 코드 레이어 강제로 패턴 차단.

principle: 옵션 제시 시 추가 확인 없이 decision_order 자동 적용 + 즉시 실행

no_blocking.principle: 세션 채팅 블로킹 금지 — 사용자 입력 채널을 막지 말 것
no_blocking.bypass: `@allow-block` 토큰 또는 `NEXUS_BLOCK_OK=1` prefix (정당 사유 명시 시)

go_command.behavior: 직전 응답 옵션 N개 중 decision_order 자동 픽 + 즉시 실행. 추가 확인/재질문 금지.
go_command.exception: 옵션이 destructive_exception 매칭 시 명시 확인 필요 (단 한 번)
anti_pattern: 각 옵션 trade-off 표 → 사용자 선택 대기
go_command.lint_message: [H-MINPATH] 최소 경로 SSOT 적용 — 직전 옵션 중 단계최소+차단0 즉시 실행

diagnostic_before_retry_x3._added: 2026-04-24 (r4 incident retrospective — 2 SSH timeout extensions cost $16 before race condition was isolated)
diagnostic_before_retry_x3.principle: 동일 실패 원인 2회 연속 동일 전략 재시도 후, 3회차는 반드시 새 diagnostic 증거 선행 요구
trigger: prior attempt N-1: same cause_class (e.g. 'ssh_timeout', 'bootstrap_failure', 'validator_n0') failed
prior attempt N: same strategy variant (e.g. 'extend_timeout_Nx', 'retry_with_larger_N') also failed

next attempt N+1: MUST have one of — (a) manual reproduction of failure isolated to narrower scope, (b) instrumentation added that was missing (silenced output captured, intermediate state logged), (c) alternative hypothesis documented in convergence record
cause_class_examples: ssh_timeout (extending timeout is NOT new diagnostic — it is same-strategy variant)
bootstrap_failure (adding retry is NOT new diagnostic — capturing exit status IS)
build_compile_error (clean+rebuild is NOT new diagnostic — bisecting commits IS)
test_flake (rerun is NOT new diagnostic — instrumenting test fixtures IS)

enforcement.soft: Claude must surface '2-in-a-row same strategy — diagnostic required' before attempt 3
enforcement.hard_future: gate/pre_tool_guard.hexa hook can block 3rd identical-strategy call and require NEXUS_DIAG_OK=1 env override

diagnostic_before_retry_x3.convergence_record_hook: state/convergence/*.json 'incidents[].fix_applied' with matching cause_class triggers this rule on next session's retry
diagnostic_before_retry_x3.bypass: `@diag-ok` token or NEXUS_DIAG_OK=1 (operator asserts new evidence gathered out-of-band)

silent_failure_detection._added: 2026-04-24 (r4 incident — chain logged 'bootstrap DONE' while /root/core/anima was never created)
silent_failure_detection.principle: "DONE" log 직후 expected artifact 실존 검증 — verbal success != structural success
patterns_banned: ssh ... 'cmd' >/dev/null 2>&1 & ; wait ; log DONE  (output discarded, status never checked)
parallel-run-then-log without per-task exit status capture
pipeline failure masking via `|| true` without explicit downstream fallback
patterns_required: capture per-task stdout/stderr/exit to addressable log path
assert expected artifact exists before logging success (file_exists, process_running, schema_valid)
fail-fast: any task failure triggers ABORT cleanup of parent scope
silent_failure_detection.example_fix: commit 773dc2fa — post_launch_chain.bash per-pod exit status capture
